_notes.job_classes: Add/remove SF job class codes (as strings) to filter. Leave the list empty ([]) to match ALL Permanent Exempt jobs.
_notes.email: Set 'to' here for local runs. For GitHub Actions, set SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, and ALERT_EMAIL as repository secrets.
_notes.employment_type: Change to 'Temporary Exempt', 'Permanent Civil Service', etc. to watch a different type.
